hero.title: Premium that supports your life goals
hero.subtitle: Liferadar Premium helps you stay consistent and intentional. We monetize so we can sustain value, not to distract from your growth.

publicMessage.title: Built for better lives first, revenue second.
publicMessage.body: You can start free and get real value right away. Premium is optional for people who want deeper support.

memberMessage.title: You are already on the journey.
memberMessage.body: Premium simply gives you more structure, family coordination, and advanced follow-through tools.

packages.title: Subscription Packages
packages.subtitle: Choose the level that matches your stage of life and commitment.

starter.name: Starter (Free)
starter.audience: For anyone beginning intentional life management
starter.note: Start here and upgrade only when you need more depth.

focus.name: Focus Premium
focus.audience: For committed individuals building stronger habits
focus.feature1: Advanced progress insights and trend views
focus.note: Best balance for personal growth and accountability.

family.name: Family Premium
family.note: Ideal for parents who want alignment without complexity.

coach.name: Coach and Team
coach.audience: For mentors, coaches, or small guided communities
coach.note: Built for people helping others stay on track.
